# Momentum unit standard

## Short Teaching Summary
The standard metric unit for momentum is kg•m/s.

## Difficulty
0.00

## Prerequisites
- None recorded.

## Related Concepts
- None recorded.

## Misconceptions
- None recorded.

## Best Examples
- The standard metric unit of momentum is kg•m/s, but other units like kg•mi/hr, kg•km/hr, and g•cm/s are also acceptable.

- None recorded.
